memberdef.name: EccMatrix

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the NAND flash and gets the geometry information.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the geometry information from ONFI parameter page.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is pointer to the ONFI parameter page.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the feature list from ONFI parameter page.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is pointer to ONFI parameter page buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the Data Interface from ONFI parameter page.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is pointer to ONFI parameter page buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the Timing mode from ONFI parameter page.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is pointer to ONFI parameter page buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (XNandPsu *InstancePtr, u32 RegOffset, u32 Mask, u32 Timeout)
memberdef.name: XNandPsu_PollRegTimeout

briefdescription.para: This function polls for a register bit set status till the timeout.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the offset of register.
is the bitmask.
is the timeout value.

briefdescription.para: This function sets packet size and packet count values in packet register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the packet size.
is the packet count.

briefdescription.para: This function sets Page and Column values in the Memory address registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the page value.
is the column value.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the size of page in Command Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the chip select value in memory address2 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.

briefdescription.para: This function sends ONFI Reset command to the flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.

briefdescription.para: This function sends ONFI Read Status command to the flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.
is the ONFI status value to return.

memberdef.argsstring: (XNandPsu *InstancePtr, u32 Target, u8 IdAddr, u32 IdLen, u8 *Buf)
memberdef.name: XNandPsu_OnfiReadId

briefdescription.para: This function sends ONFI Read ID command to the flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.
is the ONFI ID value to return.

briefdescription.para: This function sends the ONFI Read Parameter Page command to flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.
is the index of parameter page.
is the parameter page information to return.

memberdef.argsstring: (XNandPsu *InstancePtr, u32 Target, u32 Page, u32 Col, u8 *Buf)
memberdef.name: XNandPsu_ProgramPage

briefdescription.para: This function sends ONFI Program Page command to flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.
is the page address value to program.
is the column address value to program.
is the data buffer to program.

memberdef.argsstring: (XNandPsu *InstancePtr, u32 Target, u32 Page, u32 Col, u8 *Buf)
memberdef.name: XNandPsu_ReadPage

briefdescription.para: This function sends ONFI Read Page command to flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.
is the page address value to read.
is the column address value to read.
is the data buffer to fill in.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the flash supports on-die ECC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is pointer to ONFI parameter page.

briefdescription.para: This function setup the Ecc Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (XNandPsu *InstancePtr, u32 Target, u32 Col, u32 PktSize, u32 PktCount, u8 *Buf)
memberdef.name: XNandPsu_ChangeReadColumn

briefdescription.para: This function issues change read column and reads the data into buffer specified by user.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.
is the coulmn address.
is the number of bytes to read.
is the number of transactions to read.
is the data buffer to fill in.

memberdef.argsstring: (XNandPsu *InstancePtr, u32 Target, u32 Col, u32 PktSize, u32 PktCount, u8 *Buf)
memberdef.name: XNandPsu_ChangeWriteColumn

briefdescription.para: This function issues change read column and reads the data into buffer specified by user.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.
is the coulmn address.
is the number of bytes to read.
is the number of transactions to read.
is the data buffer to fill in.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes extended parameter page ECC information.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the Extended parameter page buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (XNandPsu *InstancePtr, u8 *Buf, u32 PktCount, u32 PktSize, u32 Operation, u8 DmaMode)
memberdef.name: XNandPsu_Data_ReadWrite

briefdescription.para: This function Read/Writes data from the nand controller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the data buffer.
is the number packet chunks.
is the size of the packet.
is 1 for write and 0 for read.
is 1 for Dma and 0 for PIO.

briefdescription.para: This function waits for the transfer complete event.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.

simplesect.para: Expects that transfer complete event was set before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: This function waits for the device ready stataus.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chipselect value.

briefdescription.para: This function reads data from the fifo.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the buffer pointer.
of the Buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function writes data to the fifo.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the buffer pointer.
of the Buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the given dma address to the controller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the buffer pointer.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a specific XNandPsu instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the NAND flash device to read or write any data.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
points to XNandPsu device configuration structure.
is the base address of NAND flash controller.

simplesect.para: The user needs to first call the XNandPsu_LookupConfig() API which returns the Configuration structure pointer which is passed as a parameter to the XNandPsu_CfgInitialize() API.

briefdescription.para: This function enables DMA mode of controller operation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables DMA mode of driver/controller operation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables ECC mode of driver/controller operation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables ECC mode of driver/controller operation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function setup the Ecc Spare Command Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the length including bad blocks from a given offset and length.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the flash data address to read from.
is number of bytes to read.

listitem.para: Return actual length including bad blocks.

briefdescription.para: This function writes to the flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the starting offset of flash to write.
is the number of bytes to write.
is the source data buffer to write.

briefdescription.para: This function reads from the flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the starting offset of flash to read.
is the number of bytes to read.
is the destination data buffer to fill in.

briefdescription.para: This function erases the flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the starting offset of flash to erase.
is the number of bytes to erase.

simplesect.para: The Offset and Length should be aligned to block size boundary to get better results.

briefdescription.para: This function sends ONFI Program Page command to flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the page address value to program.
is the data buffer to program.

briefdescription.para: This function reads spare bytes from flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the page address value to read.
is the data buffer to fill in.

briefdescription.para: This function sends ONFI block erase command to the flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.
is the block to erase.

briefdescription.para: This function sends ONFI Get Feature command to flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.
is the feature selector.
is the buffer to fill feature value.

briefdescription.para: This function sends ONFI Set Feature command to flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the chip select value.
is the feature selector.
is the feature value to send.

briefdescription.para: This function changes clock frequency of flash controller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the clock frequency to change.

briefdescription.para: This function changes the data interface and timing mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the new data interface.
is the new timing mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (XNandPsu *InstancePtr, u8 Cmd1, u8 Cmd2, u8 EccState, u8 DmaMode, u8 AddrCycles)
memberdef.name: XNandPsu_Prepare_Cmd

briefdescription.para: This function prepares command to be written into command register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPsu instance.
is the first Onfi Command.
is the second Onfi Command.
is the flag to set Ecc State.
is the flag to set DMA mode.
is the number of Address Cycles.
